_comment: Default corpus catalog shipped with Veritate. Each entry's stem is the on-disk basename (foo -> foo_train.bin / foo_val.bin in plugins/corpus/). format='raw_bytes' = direct URL written as a uint8 byte stream (Veritate trains byte-level, so plaintext bytes ARE tokens). format='hf_dataset' = stream rows from a HuggingFace dataset, encode each text column as UTF-8, separate rows with two newlines. max_bytes_train caps how much of streaming HF data is written before stopping. val_split_ratio carves off the tail of the downloaded train file as val.bin when no separate val source is supplied. recommended_min_params / _max_params drive the training-tab size-mismatch warning. The dashboard prompts the user for confirmation before installing any corpus larger than 10 GB; the backend additionally requires confirm_large=true in the install body for those.

corpora.label: Tiny Shakespeare
corpora.description: All Shakespeare's works concatenated. ~1 MB. Classic warmup corpus.

corpora.label: TinyStories
corpora.description: Synthetic short children's stories (Eldan & Li, 2023). ~1 GB streamed. Designed for 1M-50M parameter models.

corpora.label: WikiText-103
corpora.description: Curated Wikipedia article subset (Salesforce, raw). ~500 MB streamed. Good fit for 30M-200M parameter models.

corpora.label: enwik8
corpora.description: First 100 MB of English Wikipedia (Hutter Prize). Classic char-level benchmark. 5M-50M params.

corpora.label: PG-19 (Project Gutenberg pre-1919)
corpora.description: Long-form English books published before 1919 (DeepMind PG-19). Public domain. Capped at 10 GB stream. 50M+ parameter models.

corpora.label: OpenWebText (10 GB subset)
corpora.description: GPT-2-style web crawl (Skylion007). Streamed and capped at 10 GB. 100M-500M parameter models.

corpora.label: The Pile (uncopyrighted, 50 GB subset)
corpora.description: Curated multi-source mix (academic, code, web, books, dialogue). Streamed and capped at 50 GB. Chinchilla-fits 500M-3B parameter models.

corpora.label: SlimPajama (100 GB subset)
corpora.description: Cleaned and deduplicated RedPajama (Cerebras). Streamed and capped at 100 GB. Chinchilla-fits 3B-10B parameter models at default cap; raise the cap for full 627B-token training.

corpora.label: RedPajama-V2 (200 GB subset)
corpora.description: Common Crawl filtered corpus (Together). Streamed and capped at 200 GB. Sized for Chinchilla-optimal training of 10B+ parameter models at default cap; raise for full 30T tokens.
